scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm run dev || echo 'No backend dev script configured yet'
scripts.build: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm run build; else next build; fi
scripts.backend: cd backend && npm run dev || echo 'No backend dev script configured yet'
scripts.prepare-next: echo 'Next.js migration preparation step: move frontend into a Next.js app under /frontend or /frontend-next'
